Title: Bambu Lab A1 Mini 3D Printer
Description:
The A1 mini revolutionizes flow control in 3D printing. It utilizes a high-resolution, high-frequency eddy current sensor to measure the pressure in the nozzle. Our algorithm actively compensates the flow rate according to the readings to extrude with accuracy.
The A1 mini handles various calibrations all by itself. It meticulously calibrates the Z-offset, bed-level, vibration resonance and nozzle pressure for EVERY print job, automatically.
The A1 mini comes to you pre-assembled, pre-squared, and pre-tuned with precision. It only takes about 20 minutes to set up for your first print.
The A1 mini can calibrate parameters to match tiny individual differences between each drive motor. This compensates for the unwanted harshness of motor noise.
Full-metal Rails, rigid frame, nozzle pressure sensor, accelerometers, powerful MCU, and above all, an advanced motion control system that utilizes these features to print a 14-minute benchy with quality and following all the speed benchy rules straight out of the box without using specialized filaments.
Remote control and monitor your printer on Bambu Studio or Bambu Handy. Through the built-in camera, you can also record timelapse videos.
Technical Specfications:
Body 	Build Volume(W*D*H) 	180*180*180 mm³
Toolhead 	Hot End 	All-Metal
Nozzle 	Stainless Steel
Max Hot End Temperature 	300 °C
Nozzle Diameter 	0.4 mm (Included)
0.2 mm, 0.6 mm, 0.8 mm
Heatbed 	Build Plate 	Bambu Textured PEI Plate (Included)
Bambu Smooth PEI Plate
Max Build Plate Temperature 	80°C
Speed 	Max Speed of Tool Head 	500mm/s
Max Acceleration of Tool Head 	10000mm/s²
Supported Filament 	PLA, PETG, TPU, PVA 	Ideal
ABS, ASA, PC, PA, PET,
Carbon/Glass Fiber Reinforced Polymer 	Not Recommended
Sensors 	Monitoring Camera 	Low Framerate Camera (Up to 1080P)
Timelapse Supported
Filament Run Out Sensor 	Yes
Filament Odometry 	Yes
Power Loss Recover 	Yes
Filament Tangle Sensor 	Yes
Physical Dimensions 	A1 mini : 347*315*365 mm³ , Package size : 385*430*460 mm³ , Net weight 5.5 kg , Gross weight 8.2 kg

Title: Bambu Lab A1 3D Printer
Description:
A1 handles various calibrations all by itself. It meticulously calibrates the Z-offset, bed-level, vibration resonance and nozzle pressure for EVERY print job, automatically.
A1 is equipped with low-drag linear rails, a powerful MCU,accelerometers, a nozzle pressure sensor, and an advanced motion control system that maximizes their potential. Its high-speed performance is built on a solid foundation, ensuring consistent reliability with stable and uniform output for every print.
3D printing is a complex task where many things can go wrong. The A1 is equipped with a comprehensive print status monitoring system to help keep the print job in check.
A1 features 256mm*256mm*256mm build volume, bigger than most of the entry-level printers. Print a helmet in one go, we got you.
Not only can you connect your A1 to any device you prefer through Bambu Cloud Service, but you can also do so through LAN-only mode. We offer fully customizable connection options to match your privacy preferences.

Description:
The Bambu Lab P1S AMS 2 Pro Combo 3D printer is designed for professionals and enthusiasts seeking high precision, high speed, and multifunctional applications. It combines the high-performance P1S printing unit with the innovative AMS 2 Pro automatic material system, allowing for printing with up to four materials and multiple colors, significantly reducing cumbersome operations and enhancing printing efficiency. With a spacious build area, rapid printing capabilities, and intelligent sensors that monitor the printing status in real-time, it ensures the exquisite quality and stable reliability of every piece. Whether for prototype development, product design, or creative projects, the Bambu Lab P1S AMS 2 Pro Combo is the ideal tool to help you effortlessly realize complex ideas.

Bambu Lab P1S AMS 2 Pro Combo Main Features：

Multi-color printing with AMS automatic material combination
Intelligent sensors and real-time monitoring
High-speed printing
Printing vibration compensation
Fan speed feedback
Power outage recovery printing

Title: Bambu Lab X1 Carbon 3D Printer
Description:
Bambu Lab X1C, equipped with extra cooling and a hardened nozzle and drive gear, unlocks a wider selection of materials, including PA, PC, PET, and TPU, and specializes in carbon fiber and glass fiber reinforced polymers.
The active vibration compensation (XY) algorithm and extrusion compensation guarantees extra smoothness and gets you good prints.
Dual Auto Bed Leveling system checks for increased reliability.The lidar and analog force sensors crosscheck for an extra layer of redundancy in bed leveling.
Tired of waiting out that first layer? The lidar sensor can check your first layer so that you can get back to doing...anything else.
Our Al keeps an eye out for Spaghetti monsters, so you can sleep easy in the knowledge that your printer is safe from this scourge.

Title: Bambu Lab H2D 3D Printer
Description:
The Bambu Lab H2D is a multifunction 3D printer offering dual-nozzle printing, optional laser engraving/cutting, and a 350x320x325 mm³ print volume. It features a closed-loop servo extruder and a 5μm resolution optical motion calibration system for precise printing. The H2D also includes an AI-backed nozzle camera for real-time monitoring of the print process, as well as active chamber heating and a high-temperature hotend.
Key Features:
Dual-Nozzle Printing: Supports multi-material and multi-color prints using two nozzles.
Optional Laser Engraving/Cutting: Can be upgraded with 10W or 40W laser modules for additional capabilities.
Large Print Volume: Offers a 350x320x325 mm³ build volume.
Advanced Motion System: Uses a Core-XY architecture for faster and more precise movements.
Closed-Loop Servo Extruder: Ensures accurate filament flow and pressure control.
AI-Backed Nozzle Camera: Continuously monitors the printing process for issues like material accumulation and extrusion failures.
Active Chamber Heating: Provides a stable temperature environment for specific materials.
High-Temperature Hotend: Supports a wide range of filaments, including high-temperature options.
5μm Resolution Optical Motion Calibration: Ensures highly accurate print geometry.
Safety Features: Includes flame-retardant chamber, flame sensors, and an optional CO2 fire extinguisher system.
Technical Specification:

Title: Bambu Lab - H2D AMS Combo
Technical sheet:
The Bambu Lab H2D is a multifunction 3D printer offering dual-nozzle printing, optional laser engraving/cutting, and a 350x320x325 mm³ print volume. It features a closed-loop servo extruder and a 5μm resolution optical motion calibration system for precise printing. The H2D also includes an AI-backed nozzle camera for real-time monitoring of the print process, as well as active chamber heating and a high-temperature hotend.
Key Features:
Dual-Nozzle Printing: Supports multi-material and multi-color prints using two nozzles.
Optional Laser Engraving/Cutting: Can be upgraded with 10W or 40W laser modules for additional capabilities.
Large Print Volume: Offers a 350x320x325 mm³ build volume.
Advanced Motion System: Uses a Core-XY architecture for faster and more precise movements.
Closed-Loop Servo Extruder: Ensures accurate filament flow and pressure control.
AI-Backed Nozzle Camera: Continuously monitors the printing process for issues like material accumulation and extrusion failures.
Active Chamber Heating: Provides a stable temperature environment for specific materials.
High-Temperature Hotend: Supports a wide range of filaments, including high-temperature options.
5μm Resolution Optical Motion Calibration: Ensures highly accurate print geometry.
Safety Features: Includes flame-retardant chamber, flame sensors, and an optional CO2 fire extinguisher system.

features:
For bulk orders or B2B inquiries, Whatsapp or Email

Bambulab----click here to pdf

Even the printer come out of the factory with superb accuracy, mechanical wear and variances over time are inevitable—but now, first time in the industry, there’s a solution. With the Vision Encoder, the H2S achieves distance-independent motion accuracy under 50 μm—thinner than a human hair. During calibration, it automatically compensates for mechanical drift, ensuring consistent precision and peak performance over time.

ambu Lab's Auto Hole/Contour Compensation minimizes printing tolerances, delivering machine-shop-level precision for hole dimensions. Design fit-critical parts with confidence—integrate shafts, bearings, and fasteners without trial and error. Post-print assembly has never been easier.

Featuring a 350 °C hotend and a 65 °C actively heated chamber, it supports the entire Bambu filament lineup—from PLA and PETG to PC and PPA. With closed-loop fan control and precise thermal management, the H2S minimizes warping and deformation while improving layer adhesion. Build large, high-performance parts that are as functional as they are strong.

H2S uses both the sensing capability of its servo motor on the extruder and the high-resolution eddy current sensors on the nozzle to precisely control extrusion by measuring nozzle pressure and calibrating PA parameters for each filament, improving surface smoothness and edge sharpness.

Active Vibration Compensation neutralizes micro-vibrations and resonance in real time, enabling premium print quality at higher speeds.

Bambu Lab's proprietary PMSM servo system enables 20 kHz resistance and position sampling to dynamically modulate electromagnetic torque vectors. It stabilizes extrusion and actively detects grinding or clogs in real time.

Vision system With AI-driven real-time monitoring, the vision system detects clumping, spaghetti and purge chute jamming as they happen, helping prevent failed prints before they start. This same vision system powers advanced features like Live Spatial Alignment, allowing precise laser and cutting calibration, and Vision Encoder technology, which enhances positional accuracy.

Feeding Filament-path sensors work in unison to monitor feeding speed and position, detect filament tangles and grinding risks, track filament mileage and spool usage, and ensure tool readiness across the AMS, buffer, cutter, and feeding paths, making sure every tool is in place and every move is under control.

Thermal Control Five NTC temperature sensors are strategically placed across the nozzle, heatbed, and chamber. Paired with integrated airflow sensors, the system actively monitors and adjusts internal temperatures and circulation, maintaining the ideal print environment through real-time feedback control.

Safety The H2S features five flame sensors, front-door and top-cover sensors, and emergency stop button to form a complete safety system. It detects fire risks, monitors enclosure alignment, and allows instant shutdown when needed—protecting your projects and your workspace at all times.

Prior to each operational cycle, the H2S vision system initiates a comprehensive pre-flight checklist: Chamber Integrity Scan – Detects debris across the entire print surface. Hardware Configuration Audit – Instantly identifies build plate properties.

High-Temp Printing
Chamber sealed. Internal air recirculates through the Air Filter and the heater to stabilize high-temp conditions. Print large engineering parts without warping.


Low-Temp Printing
Top Vent opens to bring in cool air, while maintaining a filtered exhaust⁽⁴⁾. Print PLA and PETG without opening the door, and handle overhangs and bridging with ease.


Laser Cutting/Engraving
Top Vent and Filter Switch Flap open. Fumes are channeled efficiently to the ventilation system, keeping your workspace safe and clean.

Description:
The Bambu Lab H2C-AMS-Combo 3D Printer redefines high-performance multi-material 3D printing with precision, speed, and intelligence. Built on advanced Fused Deposition Modeling technology, it features a robust aluminum-steel chassis, fully enclosed chamber, and hardened steel extrusion system capable of handling demanding engineering materials.

With support for printing up to seven materials in a single job without purge waste the H2C enables complex, integrated designs effortlessly. Its AI-driven monitoring, ultra-fine 50 µm motion accuracy, and automatic calibration ensure consistent, professional-grade results, making it ideal for industrial prototyping, advanced R&D, and professional manufacturing workflows.

The Bambu Lab H2C Laser Full Combo 40W is a dual-function manufacturing solution for professionals. Based on the efficient Vortek System, this FDM machine drastically minimizes material waste by swapping hotends in seconds, ensuring clean transitions.

The Bambu Lab H2D Pro EU AMS Combo 3D Printer is a powerful, enterprise-ready FDM 3D printer designed for precision, durability, and secure deployment in professional environments. Built with an aluminum and steel chassis, it delivers ultra-fast printing speeds up to 1000 mm/s while maintaining exceptional accuracy using a 5 µm vision encoder system. The tungsten carbide nozzle offers outstanding wear resistance for abrasive filaments, significantly reducing maintenance. With advanced air filtration, active chamber heating, Ethernet connectivity, and WPA2-Enterprise Wi-Fi security, the H2D Pro is ideal for engineering labs, production floors, and enterprise printer fleets demanding reliability, accuracy, and secure network integration.

Title: Bambu Lab X2D Combo 3D Printer (Pre Order)
features:
For bulk orders or B2B inquiries, Whatsapp or Email

The Bambu Lab X2D Combo 3D Printer is a next-generation dual-nozzle CoreXY 3D printer designed for creators, professionals, and businesses who demand high-speed, multi-material, and high-precision printing. Featuring an advanced dual-extrusion system, the X2D enables faster multi-color printing, cleaner support removal, and seamless printing with engineering-grade materials. Equipped with hardened steel nozzles capable of reaching 300°C, an actively heated chamber, AI-powered print monitoring, and closed-loop servo extrusion technology, the X2D delivers exceptional print quality with improved reliability and reduced material waste. Its fully enclosed design, HEPA air filtration system, automatic calibration, and high-speed motion system make it ideal for printing PLA, PETG, ABS, ASA, TPU, Nylon, and carbon-fiber composites with professional-grade consistency. The printer supports Bambu Studio, Bambu Handy, and AMS 2 Pro integration for an optimized and user-friendly 3D printing ecosystem.

Title: Bambu Lab A2L Combo 3D Printer (Pre-order)
features:
The Bambu Lab A2L Combo 3D Printer is a powerful large-format 3D printer designed for makers, professionals, educators, and businesses seeking exceptional print quality with minimal setup. Featuring an expansive 330 x 320 x 325 mm build volume, the A2L provides over 105% more printing space than standard 256 mm printers, allowing users to create larger models, functional prototypes, cosplay props, and batch productions in a single print. Its Full-Auto Calibration system automatically handles bed leveling, flow calibration, and vibration compensation, ensuring reliable and consistent results right out of the box.

Built for advanced multi-color and multi-material printing, the A2L seamlessly integrates with Bambu Lab AMS systems, supporting up to 19-color printing, filament drying, and enclosed filament storage. Equipped with intelligent print monitoring, adaptive vibration compensation, ultra-quiet operation, and optional modular add-ons for blade cutting and pen plotting, the Bambu Lab A2L delivers a versatile, high-performance 3D printing experience for both creative and professional applications.
